data.body:
in ./skills we have a markdown file for each state that is sent to the agent as a response to `kno claim <id>`.

wherever the the prompt says to call `kno next <id>`, update the prompt to include the following command options:

      --actor-kind agent    
      --agent-name <AGENT_NAME>        Agent name for step metadata.
      --agent-model <AGENT_MODEL>      Agent model for step metadata.
      --agent-version <AGENT_VERSION>  Agent version for step metadata.
data.title: Augment kno claim state markdown files
